item.name: Qeziigural Horn
item.description: A curved horn that, when blown, emits an implacable sound that summons forth your qeziigural.

mount.name: Qeziigural
mount.action: Summon forth your qeziigural, a winged golem whose name means “gold that flies” in the Mamool Ja tongue.
mount.description: Encountered in Cenote Ja Ja Gural, this winged stone construct is outfitted with golden adornments whose engravings bespeak Mamool Ja origins. As its bare body appears to hail from an earlier time, however, it is believed to be a Yok Huy relic that was repurposed and decorated.
mount.tooltip:
Don't indulge them with anything
but a face of stony indifference.
- Papa Gruff
